title: Warm Wholesome Malaysian Chicken Bowl
description: A lazy-sunday Malaysian chicken bowl with creamy mayo, render‑fat and fresh veggies, packed in a bento box for a cozy meal.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Whisk together soy sauce, sesame oil, honey, minced garlic, grated ginger and lime juice.
Coat chicken thighs with the sauce and let marinate for 10 minutes.
Roast chicken in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, flipping halfway, until internal temperature reaches 74°C, then let rest for 5 minutes.
Render 2 tablespoons of the drained chicken fat in a skillet over medium heat until browned, then set aside for later use.
Spread a layer of cooked jasmine rice in a bowl, arrange sliced carrot and shredded cabbage on top.
Slice the rested chicken and place it over the vegetables.
In a small bowl combine mayonnaise and the rendered fat; whisk until creamy and drizzle over the chicken.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro if desired and serve warm in a bento box.
